name: Thrust: Surviving Acting School
overview: Thrust is a web series that gives the world a behind-the-scenes into college BFA programs and everything zany, absurd, and straight-up wild about it. Through the eyes and experiences of the new freshman class, learn what it's like to major in acting at a university, and follow our eight lovable thespians-to-be as they navigate the assignments, acting techniques, relationships, and of course, the school play.

trailers.title: THRUST: Surviving Acting School | Official Webseries Trailer (2025)
